name: Artificial Hawaii Potted Plant - Threshold™
description:
Bring enchanting tropical beauty to your space with this Artificial Hawaii Plant Potted Threshold™. This decorative plant showcases a faux Hawaii plant housed inside a ceramic container with faux-soil filler for lovely display. Plus, the artificial construction means it stays beautiful without the need for watering or pruning

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
